subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! Jinab-i-Salil hath arrived and we have met with him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم جناب سلیل وارد و ملاقات نمودیم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
